Laura Leigh Geist, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, 415-986-5900, for defendant and moving party , Century Surety. Thomas McCormick, Esq. 925-787-0925 for plaintiff and opposing party , Steve Dan.

RULING:
Argued and The Court changed its tenetative ruling.
DEFENDANT CENTURY SURETY COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT for 1st, 3rd, 4th & 6th C.O.A.'s is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. 1st amended complaint to be filed by 4/27/05. Notice is waived. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CENTURY SURETY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to 4/7/05 on the court's own motion.
